name: Infomart Corporation
summary: Infomart Corporation operates an online business to business (BtoB) EC trading platform for the food industry in Japan. It offers BtoB platform matching, BtoB platform ordering, BtoB platform standards database, BtoB platform invoicing, BtoB platform quoting, BtoB platform contract, and BtoB platform industry news and data portal. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
